title: Fused facility-risk incident
what_happened: A synthetic facility asset is exposed to an elevated fire-weather corridor while a passive cyber exposure and operator field report increase operational concern.
why_we_believe_it: The hazard fixture places a high-severity fire-weather alert near the facility corridor.
The asset fixture identifies a critical facility inside the affected area.
The cyber fixture records a passive CVE exposure against the facility vendor stack.
The field report fixture independently reports visible smoke, impaired access, and degraded local communications.
operational_risk: Critical synthetic demo risk: continuity, access, and cyber resilience should be reviewed, but active scanning or external action is not authorized in fixture mode.

gated_actions.action: Run live scanner against facility infrastructure

notes: First Orion decision-card fixture for OSIRIS excavation migration.
